title: Post-order Razorpay payment flow (remove product-level CTA)

requirements.summary: Remove standalone Razorpay payment CTA from product cards while keeping “Order Now” scroll-to-order behavior.
acceptanceCriteria: On the customer landing page, product cards no longer show a “Pay with Razorpay” / “Try Again” / “Pay Again” payment flow.
The “Order Now” button still scrolls the user to the order form section.
No Razorpay checkout can be initiated directly from the Products section.

file_operations.description: Remove the product-level Razorpay payment flow: delete Razorpay key fetching (useRazorpayKeyId), payment state/status alerts, and all Pay/Try Again/Pay Again buttons; keep the existing “Order Now” button and scroll handler intact. Ensure there is no code path that can call openRazorpayCheckout from the Products section. Verify the component's usage instructions before implementing.

requirements.summary: After an order is created from the Order Form, show a post-order Razorpay payment panel for that specific order with clear order reference and feedback states.
acceptanceCriteria: Submitting the order form calls the existing backend createOrder API and the UI captures the returned Order (including orderId and totalAmount).
After order creation succeeds, the UI shows a “Pay now” action for that order, using the exact order total amount.
Payment status messages are shown for: processing, success, cancelled/dismissed, and error (all user-facing text in English).
If the Razorpay key is unavailable, the pay button is disabled and an English error/help message is shown.

file_operations.description: Update the order submission flow to capture and store the returned Order from createOrder (including orderId and totalAmount). After a successful submission, render an in-place post-order payment panel directly within the OrderForm section (not a separate page): show the created order ID and amount, and a “Pay now” button. Use existing shadcn/ui components already imported/available (e.g., Card, Alert, Button, Badge) by composing them (do not edit frontend/src/components/ui). Add user-facing English feedback states: processing, success, cancelled/dismissed, and error; ensure “Pay now” is disabled with an English help message when the Razorpay key is missing/unavailable. Verify the component's usage instructions before implementing.

Extend the Razorpay checkout helper to support the post-order payment UX requirements: allow passing through order-identifying metadata (e.g., orderId and amount display name/notes) and reliably surface modal dismiss (cancelled) vs handler success vs load/init errors so the OrderForm panel can show the required English processing/success/cancel/error states. Keep the approach client-side as currently implemented. Verify the component's usage instructions before implementing.

Adjust the Razorpay key hook behavior to be compatible with disabling the pay button when the key is unavailable: ensure failures can be interpreted by the UI (e.g., by surfacing error state from React Query) without logging/exposing the key. Verify the component's usage instructions before implementing.

requirements.summary: On Razorpay success, call backend to mark the created order as paid and update the post-order UI to reflect paid state, with a support instruction on failure.
acceptanceCriteria: On Razorpay successful payment callback, the frontend calls the new backend method with the created orderId and received razorpay_payment_id.
After the backend call succeeds, the UI reflects that the order payment is paid (and no longer shows a pending pay action for that same order in the post-order panel).
If the backend call fails after a Razorpay success, the UI shows an English error message instructing the user to contact support/admin with the order ID and payment ID.

file_operations.description: Create a React Query mutation hook that invokes the backend capability to mark an order as paid after a Razorpay success. The hook should accept (orderId, razorpayPaymentId) and call the actor method in a way that remains compatible even if the generated frontend typings lag behind (e.g., by using a safe runtime call pattern). Verify the component's usage instructions before implementing.

Wire the post-order payment panel to call the new useMarkOrderAsPaid hook on Razorpay success with the created orderId and the returned razorpay_payment_id. After a successful backend call, update local UI state to show paid/success and remove/disable the pending pay action for that order. If the backend call fails after Razorpay success, show an English error message instructing the user to contact support/admin and include both the order ID and payment ID in the message. Verify the component's usage instructions before implementing.
